feat_race_dwarven_resilience.name: Dwarven Resilience
feat_race_dwarven_resilience.description: Your bond with the mountain grants you protection against toxins. You have advantage on saving throws against poison. At 3rd level, you can cast *Shield of Faith*. At 5th level, you can cast *Warding Bond*.

feat_race_feline_agility.name: Feline Agility
feat_race_feline_agility.description: Your reflexes allow you to move with a burst of speed. When you move on your turn in combat, you can double your speed until the end of the turn. At 3rd level, you can cast *Jump*.

feat_race_arcane_intuition.name: Arcane Intuition
feat_race_arcane_intuition.description: Born with magic in your veins, you possess a natural talent for the arcane. You know the *Prestidigitation* cantrip. At 3rd level, you can cast *Detect Magic* at will.

feat_race_dual_mind.name: Dual Mind
feat_race_dual_mind.description: Your mind is a complex fortress. You have advantage on all Wisdom saving throws and resistance to psychic damage.

feat_race_mind_link.name: Mind Link
feat_race_mind_link.description: You can speak telepathically to any creature you can see within a range equal to 10 times your level (feet). You don't need a shared language, but the creature must understand at least one. As an action, you can grant the creature the ability to speak back for 1 hour.

feat_race_safe_sleep.name: Safe Sleep
feat_race_safe_sleep.description: Agnostos share a deep connection to the Goddess Elana. You are immune to spells and magical effects that require you to dream, such as the *Dream* spell, but you can still be affected by effects that put you to sleep, like the *Sleep* spell.

feat_lenam_darkvision.name: Lenam Darkvision
feat_lenam_darkvision.description: Thanks to your elven blood, you have superior vision in dark and dim conditions. You can see in dim light within 18 meters of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light. You can't discern color in darkness, only shades of gray.

feat_fey_ancestry.name: Fey Ancestry
feat_fey_ancestry.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep.

feat_skill_versatility.name: Skill Versatility
feat_skill_versatility.description: You gain proficiency in two skills of your choice.
